reference: Welcome to HealthcareMagic. It is better to get yourself checked by an obstetrician to find out the cause of the pain and receive definitive treatment. I hope everything will be alright, and you can continue your pregnancy without any problems.
text: Welcome to healthcare magic. It is better to get yourself checked by an obstetrician to find out the cause of the pain and receive definitive treatment. I hope everything will be all right and you can continue your pregnancy without any problems.
